title: Twisha Sharma death: MP High Court reserves verdict in challenge to Giribala Singh anticipatory bail
description: The Madhya Pradesh High Court on Wednesday reserved orders on pleas challenging the anticipatory bail granted to Twisha Sharma’s in-laws, including retired judge Giribala Singh, in the alleged dowry death case.The matter was heard by Justice Devnarayan Mishra today.Justice Devnarayan MishraAppearing for Twisha Sharma's father, Senior Advocate Sidharth Luthra argued that the parents were not involved in the inquest as they had not been informed of the death.
